title: The Reason Why al- Hajjaj Dismissed [Yazid b. al-Muhallabj from Khurasan and Appointed al-Mufadcial
description: [al-Hajjaj), together with 'Abd al-Rahman b. Muhammad b. alAsh'ath. Al-Hajjaj had put (Sa'id] in charge of the troops' stipends when he sent 'Abd al-Rahman to fight the Zunbil. When 'Abd alRahmin disavowed al-Hajjaj, Said was among those who disavowed him with him; and, when 'Abd al-Rahman was defeated and fled to the Zunbil's country, Said [also] fled. According to Abu Kurayb-Abu Bakr b. 'Ayyash: Al-Hajjaj wrote to so-and-so, who was in charge of I$bahan-and Said was [there]: Abu Ja'far said: I think that, when he fled from al-Hajjaj, 680.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 23
